title: T. rex Storm — Lightning Strike
alt: Scientifically accurate paleoart of a Tyrannosaurus rex caught in a dramatic lightning storm, ground-level angle with rain and electric light illuminating the apex predator.
description: A Tyrannosaurus rex stands in a violent Late Cretaceous storm — driving rain, a bruised sky, and a single lightning bolt throwing the animal into sharp silhouette. Shot low, at ground level, so it fills the frame. Detailed, realistic paleoart with accurate proportions, printed sharp enough to hang up close.
caption: A Tyrannosaurus rex stands in a violent Late Cretaceous storm as a lightning bolt throws it into silhouette, seen low and head-on.
